_comment: Sample payload for POST /api/bca/extract — uses test site project from bca_test_data.sql
transcript: Today we had 12 workers on site at Block A Level 3. RC01 team poured Grade 40 concrete for the slab at grid line C-D. Slump test passed at 75mm. RE Mr Tan verified. Two deliveries from Island Concrete, DO numbers IC-2501 and IC-2502, total 24 cubic metres.
